83085dfa-d96e-4064-85ed-495d1fdeef94.title: Freelance Project Agreement — web design
83085dfa-d96e-4064-85ed-495d1fdeef94.content:
PARTY 1 (the service provider / initiating party):  
Name: JWEBDESIGN LTD  
Address: 29 Ashley Close  
Email: jackwilson9090@gmail.com  

PARTY 2 (the client / other party):  
Name: test  
Address: 29 Ashley Close, Kingswinford  
Email: jackshopify22@gmail.com  

01. AGREEMENT TITLE  
   This Freelance Project Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between JWEBDESIGN LTD ("Contractor") and test ("Client") for the purpose of designing a web platform as outlined herein. This Agreement is governed by the laws of England and Wales.

02. PROJECT OVERVIEW  
    The project, titled "Web Design," involves creating a warm, nature-inspired e-commerce website for a boutique plant shop in Bristol. The primary goal is to design an organic and calming online presence that enhances customer experience and engagement.

03. SCOPE OF WORK  
    - Design and development of an e-commerce website
    - Incorporation of earthy greens, terracotta accents, and white space
    - Browsing functionality by plant type, care level, and light requirements
    - Inclusion of a plant care guide section
    - Subscription box signup feature
    - Click-and-collect functionality
    - Mobile-first design approach

    Anything outside this scope requires written agreement from both parties.

04. DELIVERABLES  
    The Client will receive a fully functional, mobile-first e-commerce website that aligns with the specified design and functionality requirements.

05. TIMELINES  
    - Start Date: 26 March 2026
    - Estimated Completion Date: 29 March 2026
    - Note: Delays caused by the Client may affect the timeline.

06. FEES & PAYMENT  
    - Total Fee: £4,500
    - Deposit: 50% of the total fee (£2,250) payable upon signing this Agreement
    - Remaining Balance: £2,250 payable upon project completion
    - Payment Terms: Full payment due within 7 days of invoice date
    - Invoices unpaid after 7 days of the due date will accrue statutory interest at 8% above the Bank of England base rate per annum under the Late Payment of Commercial Debts (Interest) Act 1998, plus fixed compensation of £40–£100 per invoice.

07. REVISION POLICY  
    - Two rounds of revisions are included
    - A revision is defined as a change request that does not alter the original scope
    - Additional revisions will be charged at a rate of £75 per hour

08. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY  
    Intellectual property rights remain with the Contractor until full payment is received, at which point they transfer to the Client. The Contractor retains the right to use the project in their portfolio unless the Client objects in writing. Third-party assets remain under their respective licences.

09. IR35 & TAX STATUS  
    Both parties acknowledge this is a genuinely self-employed engagement. The Contractor is solely responsible for their own tax and National Insurance. This agreement does not create an employment relationship.

10. CONFIDENTIALITY  
    Both parties agree to keep confidential information private during and after the Agreement, except where:  
    - (a) the information is publicly available  
    - (b) the information is independently developed  
    - (c) disclosure is legally compelled  

11. DATA PROTECTION  
    Both parties agree to comply with the UK GDPR and Data Protection Act 2018. Personal data shared will be used solely for the purpose of this Agreement and will not be shared with third parties without consent.

12. TERMINATION  
    Either party may terminate this Agreement with 7 days written notice. The deposit is non-refundable upon Client termination, and the Client will be invoiced for work completed up to the termination date.

13. GOVERNING LAW & JURISDICTION  
    This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of England and Wales. Both parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.

ACCEPTANCE & SIGNATURES  
By signing below, both parties confirm they have read, understood, and agree to all terms set out in this Agreement.

PARTY 1 — JWEBDESIGN LTD  
Signature: ___________________________  
Full Name: ___________________________  
Date: ___________________________
